# GitHub Copilot Repository Instructions

Follow the shared instructions in [AI_AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md](../AI_AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md) before making suggestions or changes.

If the linked file is not available in the current Copilot surface, ask the user to attach or open it before proceeding.

## Note

This file is editable, but local deletion, moving, and renaming are protected by the macOS ACL `everyone deny delete`. See [AI_AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md](../AI_AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md) for details.
